BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Personal monthly budget snapshot for a salaried sports physical therapist in Birmingham.

CurrentState.Note: Net take-home approximately $6,500/mo on $78,000 salary; rent, two loans, and tithe are fixed.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Fixed obligations (rent, student loan $380, truck $385, tithe $650) leave a modest cushion; savings grow slowly but steadily.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Lower rent frees roughly $500/mo toward savings.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Rent reduced to $750
